name: Strix
description: IP camera stream discovery tool for Frigate
compose:
name: slashnode-strix
services:
  web:
    image: eduard256/strix:2.1.0
    container_name: strix
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:4567:4567
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
